title: Junior Python Developer
description: We are looking for a motivated junior Python developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will work on backend APIs and learn best practices from senior team members. This is a great opportunity for someone starting their career.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: We need an experienced backend engineer to lead our core platform development. You will architect microservices, mentor junior developers, and make key technical decisions. Must have strong experience with Python and distributed systems.

title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Looking for a mid-level full-stack developer to build and maintain our web application. You will work on both frontend and backend, with React and FastAPI. Remote-friendly position.

title: Tech Lead - Platform Team
description: We are seeking a technical lead to guide our platform team. You will define architecture, lead a team of 5-10 engineers, and drive technical excellence. Deep experience with cloud infrastructure and distributed systems required.

title: Data Scientist
description: Join our data science team to build ML models for customer analytics. You will work on recommendation systems, predictive analytics, and data pipelines. Strong Python and ML experience required.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We need a DevOps engineer to manage our cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. Experience with Kubernetes, AWS, and Terraform is essential. You will work closely with development teams.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Looking for a skilled frontend developer to build beautiful, performant web applications. Must have strong React and TypeScript experience. Will work on our main product interface.

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Entry-level data analyst position. You will create reports, dashboards, and analyze business data. Good opportunity to learn SQL and Python for data analysis.

title: ML Engineer
description: We are looking for a machine learning engineer to build and deploy ML models at scale. Experience with TensorFlow/PyTorch and MLOps practices is required. Will work on cutting-edge AI projects.

title: Backend Developer - Django
description: Looking for a backend developer with Django experience to maintain and extend our legacy systems. You will also help migrate to newer technologies over time.

title: Staff Engineer - Distributed Systems
description: Seeking a staff engineer to architect our next-generation distributed platform. You will make critical design decisions and work on challenging scalability problems. Leadership experience required.

title: Junior DevOps
description: Entry-level DevOps position for someone eager to learn cloud infrastructure. You will assist senior engineers with deployment and monitoring tasks. Good opportunity for career growth.

title: Full-Stack Developer - Lyon
description: Join our Lyon office as a full-stack developer. You will work on various projects using Python and React. Great team environment with learning opportunities.

title: Senior Python Developer
description: Experienced Python developer needed for core platform development. You will design APIs, optimize performance, and contribute to technical decisions. Strong experience with async Python required.

title: Remote Full-Stack - Any Level
description: 100% remote position for a full-stack developer. We are flexible on seniority - junior to senior candidates welcome. Must be comfortable with Python backend and React frontend.
